items.name: ng-core
items.title: Core
items.description: Shared utilities, design tokens, and the Button primitive.

items.name: ng-attachments
items.title: Attachments
items.description: Composable attachment list with grid, inline, and list variants. Built on top of ng-core.

items.name: ng-prompt-input
items.title: Prompt Input
items.description: Prompt input family with state machine, drag-drop, and submit. The cornerstone of any AI chat surface.

items.name: ng-scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Design-system styled scrollbar — wrapper over ngx-scrollbar with the Gremorie look.

items.name: ng-charts
items.title: Charts
items.description: Charts for dashboards and generative UI. Headless primitives plus styled presets (area, line, bar, scatter, pie, radar, radial) on D3.
